2604.12456.title: X-VC: Zero-shot Streaming Voice Conversion in Codec Space
2604.12456.paper_summary: Zero-shot voice conversion (VC) aims to convert a source utterance into the voice of an unseen target speaker while preserving its linguistic content. Although recent systems have improved conversion quality, building zero-shot VC systems for interactive scenarios remains challenging because high-fidelity speaker transfer and low-latency streaming inference are difficult to achieve simultaneously. In this work, we present X-VC, a zero-shot streaming VC system that performs one-step conversion in the latent space of a pretrained neural codec. X-VC uses a dual-conditioning acoustic converter that jointly models source codec latents and frame-level acoustic conditions derived from target reference speech, while injecting utterance-level target speaker information through adaptive normalization. To reduce the mismatch between training and inference, we train the model with generated paired data and a role-assignment strategy that combines standard, reconstruction, and reversed modes. For streaming inference, we further adopt a chunkwise inference scheme with overlap smoothing that is aligned with the segment-based training paradigm of the codec. Experiments on Seed-TTS-Eval show that X-VC achieves the best streaming WER in both English and Chinese, strong speaker similarity in same-language and cross-lingual settings, and substantially lower offline real-time factor than the compared baselines. These results suggest that codec-space one-step conversion is a practical approach for building high-quality low-latency zero-shot VC systems. Audio samples are available at https://x-vc.github.io. Our code and checkpoints will also be released.
2604.12456.paper_summary_zh: 零樣本語音轉換（VC）旨在將源語句轉換為未見目標說話者的聲音，同時保留其語言內容。儘管最近的系統已改善轉換質量，但為互動場景構建零樣本VC系統仍然具有挑戰性，因為高保真說話者轉移和低延遲流推斷難以同時實現。在這項工作中，我們提出了X-VC，一種在預訓練神經編解碼器的潛在空間中執行一步轉換的零樣本流式VC系統。X-VC使用雙重條件聲學轉換器，聯合建模源編解碼器潛在變量和從目標參考語音中衍生的幀級聲學條件，同時通過自適應正規化注入語句級目標說話者信息。為了減少訓練和推斷之間的不匹配，我們使用生成的配對數據和結合標準、重建和反向模式的角色分配策略來訓練模型。對於流式推斷，我們進一步採用與編解碼器的基於段的訓練範式對齊的重疊平滑分塊推斷方案。在Seed-TTS-Eval上的實驗顯示，X-VC在英語和中文中都實現了最佳的流式WER，在同語言和跨語言設置中表現出強大的說話者相似性，並且相比於比較基線顯著降低了離線實時因子。這些結果表明，編解碼器空間的一步轉換是一種構建高質量低延遲零樣本VC系統的實用方法。音頻樣本可在 https://x-vc.github.io 獲得。我們的代碼和檢查點也將會發布。
2604.12456.author: Qixi Zheng et.al.
2604.12456.authors: Qixi Zheng, Yuxiang Zhao, Tianrui Wang, Wenxi Chen, Kele Xu, Yikang Li, Qinyuan Chen, Xipeng Qiu, Kai Yu, Xie Chen
